title: elatostema velutinum
intro: Elatostema velutinum, also known as Velvet Stem or Velvet Water Stems, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the nettle family (Urticaceae). Traditionally, Elatostema velutinum is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Elatostema velutinum can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and it is sometimes used in traditional herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
